item.title: HH FRESH TRADING CORP: HH Fresh Trading Corp. (branded) ENOKI MUSHROOM; Premium Quality; Net WT/ Poids Net 150g(5.29oz) Recall
item.product: HH Fresh Trading Corp. (branded) ENOKI MUSHROOM; Premium Quality; Net WT/ Poids Net 150g(5.29oz)
item.summary: Imported Enoki Mushrooms tested positive for Listeria Monocytogenes. Product details: HH Fresh Trading Corp. (branded) ENOKI MUSHROOM; Premium Quality; Net WT/ Poids Net 150g(5.29oz) Distributed by HH Fresh Trading Exported by JIA YANG INTERNATIONAL ENTERPRISES CO., LTD. Produced by Green Farm (Taiwan) UPC: 4711498860002
item.affectedPeople: Product was distributed to a single customer located in Texas. Product was further distributed as samples were collected in Florida.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
